title: FlyCBC
description: A addon for ImmersiveAircraft have some components that support CreateBigCannons and an MXY-7
body:
This is an addon for Immersive Aircraft, adding a manned missile(MXY-7) and some armaments suitable for Create Big Cannons to Immersive Aircraft.
这是一个Immersive Aircraft的附属 为Immersive Aircraft添加了一架樱花攻击机以及一部分适用于CBC大炮的武装
